overview.summary: Model score 6 vs user score 9 (gap -3). Primary drivers: Location Stability, Mental Readiness. Agreement classification: USER_HIGHER.

result.why_difference: Short observation window likely caused the model to smooth over transient distractions that the user perceived strongly.

prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.audio: Audio signal quality was adequate. Improve policy by up-weighting persistent >60 dBA exposure in cognitively demanding sessions.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.vitals: Vitals were partially informative; next run should treat missing HR windows as uncertainty rather than neutral evidence.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.motion: Motion context should stabilize interpretation, not override adverse audio conditions.
prediction_agent_sensor_judgment.gps: GPS is useful for confirming location stability; keep it as secondary context signal.

judgment_policy_next_run: Apply stronger session-specific context weighting over historical baseline anchoring.
Use uncertainty-aware scoring for short sessions with incomplete multimodal coverage.
